examples: It was advantageous to animals digest and imbibe soybean's nutrition composition.
Shouldn’t we want to avoid a fruit that singes the mouth and makes us imbibe vast quantities of water?
This had the advantage of making it possible for me to imbibe it, without an effort, into my whole being.
And if you happen to over-imbibe during a game that runs late, so much the worse.
Whether you imbibe or are a teetotaler, taxes on beer are more bloated than the federal budget.
